name: Zero-carb dinner: predictable post-injection hypo
description: Humulin M3 evening injection (19:00 local) covers a dinner with zero carbs — steak and green vegetables only, no rice/potato/bread. BG at injection time is around 9. The soluble component (~2.7u of a 9u dose) pulls BG down over the next 2-3 hours with no meal carbs to cover, producing a clean unchecked descent to hypo around 20:30 local (1.5h post injection, near the start of soluble peak). Demonstrates why dinner carbs aren't optional on biphasic insulin — the dose is committed at injection time regardless of what's eaten. The engine should fire a reactive nudge during the descent, preferably before BG crosses hypoFloor, warning about active insulin and recommending emergency carbs. Extracted from real 2026-04-10 evening.
